meta.title: Are other nations just copying America's stealth fighters?
meta.description:
With at least 12 new stealth aircraft in active development today, a large number of them really do look like slight variations on Lockheed Martin's F-22 or F-35 designs. 

What's the deal with that? 
#f22 #f35 #j20 #fc31 #stealth #stealthfighter #airpower #aircraft #military #defense #tech #technology
